toolbox_name: SparkFun VCNL4040 Proximity and Ambient Light Sensor

vcnl4040_init.tooltip: Create and initialize VCNL4040 proximity and ambient light sensor

vcnl4040_get_proximity.tooltip: Read VCNL4040 proximity sensor raw value (higher = closer)

vcnl4040_get_ambient.tooltip: Read VCNL4040 ambient light sensor raw value

vcnl4040_get_white.tooltip: Read VCNL4040 white channel raw value

vcnl4040_power_proximity.tooltip: Enable or disable VCNL4040 proximity sensor

vcnl4040_power_ambient.tooltip: Enable or disable VCNL4040 ambient light sensor
